---
title: Total Health Spending Over Time
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(nanoparquet)

country <- read_parquet("country.parquet")
country_year <- read_parquet("country-year.parquet")
health_spending <- read_parquet("health_spending.parquet")

spending <- health_spending |>
  filter(expenditure_type == "che") |>
  select(-che) |> 
  left_join(country, by = "iso3_code") |>
  left_join(country_year, by = c("iso3_code", "year"))
```

## Global health spending

Inspired by <https://data.one.org/analysis/turning-point-in-health-financing>

```{r}
#| label: fig-global-total
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 4

global <- spending |> 
  summarise(usd2023 = sum(usd2023), .by = c(year))

ggplot(global, aes(year, usd2023)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar(scale = 1e-12, suffix = "T")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Spending (2023 USD)", fill = NULL,
       title = "Global health spending by funding source") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## By income group

```{r}
#| label: fig-by-income
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

by_income <- spending |>
  filter(!is.na(income_group)) |>
  summarise(usd2023 = sum(usd2023), .by = c(year, income_group))

ggplot(by_income, aes(year, usd2023)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~income_group, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B", accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Spending (2023 USD)", fill = NULL,
       title = "Health spending by funding source and income group") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## By region

```{r}
#| label: fig-by-region
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

by_region <- spending |>
  summarise(usd2023 = sum(usd2023), .by = c(year, region))

ggplot(by_region, aes(year, usd2023, colour = region)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Spending (2023 USD)", colour = NULL,
       title = "Total health spending by region") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Per capita spending

```{r}
#| label: fig-per-capita-income
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

pc <- spending |>
  summarise(
    usd2023 = sum(usd2023),
    population = sum(population, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = c(year, income_group)
  ) |>
  mutate(usd_per_capita = usd2023 / population)

ggplot(pc, aes(year, usd_per_capita, colour = income_group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar()) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Health spending per capita (2023 USD)", colour = NULL,
       title = "Per capita health spending by income group") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-per-capita-region
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

pc_region <- spending |>
  summarise(
    usd2023 = sum(usd2023),
    population = sum(population, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = c(year, region)
  ) |>
  mutate(usd_per_capita = usd2023 / population)

ggplot(pc_region, aes(year, usd_per_capita, colour = region)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar()) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Health spending per capita (2023 USD)", colour = NULL,
       title = "Per capita health spending by region") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
